/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kengrave.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kengrave.dir/kengrave_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kengrave.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kengrave.dir/kengrave_autogen/UVLADIE3JM/qrc_resources.cpp.o -o kengrave  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libKirigami.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/libKF6CoreAddons.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/libKF6I18n.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/libKirigamiPlatform.so.6.24.0 /usr/lib/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6DBus.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
